faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Lake Success?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Lake Success typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping and removal, entry point sealing, and sanitization. We provide free estimates and customized pricing based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Lake Success attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the early morning or evening, visible damage to roof vents or soffits, chewed electrical wiring, droppings in the attic, and nesting materials. You may also notice squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. If you observe any of these signs, contact us immediately to prevent further damage.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in Lake Success?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, state-approved methods for squirrel removal in Lake Success. Our process includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and safe relocation practices in compliance with New York wildlife regulations. We never use poisons or harmful methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Lake Success home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day emergency service in Lake Success for urgent situations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points. After removal, we seal all access points and can repair any damage caused, ensuring squirrels cannot return to your property.
